# This test verifies that MMA repair correctly adds non-voter replicas to
# under-replicated ranges. All 10 ranges start with 3 voters (RF=3) but the
# span config requires 5 replicas with 3 voters, meaning MMA must add 2
# non-voters per range across the 6-node cluster spanning 3 regions.
#
# Expected outcome: all ranges reach 5 replicas (3V+2NV), no under-replicated
# ranges.

gen_cluster nodes=6 region=(a,b,c) nodes_per_region=(2,2,2)
----

gen_ranges ranges=10 repl_factor=3
----

# Override span config to require 5 replicas with 3 voters.
set_span_config
[0,9999999999): num_replicas=5 num_voters=3
----

assertion type=conformance under=0
----

eval duration=10m seed=42 cfgs=(mma-repair) metrics=(replicas,leases)
----
mma-repair:
leases#1: first: [s1=2, s2=2, s3=1, s4=2, s5=2, s6=1] (stddev=0.47, mean=1.67, sum=10)
leases#1: last:  [s1=2, s2=2, s3=1, s4=2, s5=2, s6=1] (stddev=0.47, mean=1.67, sum=10)
leases#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%]  (sum=0%)
replicas#1: first: [s1=5, s2=5, s3=5, s4=5, s5=5, s6=5] (stddev=0.00, mean=5.00, sum=30)
replicas#1: last:  [s1=10, s2=10, s3=5, s4=10, s5=10, s6=5] (stddev=2.36, mean=8.33, sum=50)
replicas#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%]  (sum=0%)
hash: 530f8de63d8f5d65
==========================
